description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests. The workflow has three jobs: build-openbios on ubuntu-latest, macos-build-and-test on macos-11, and publish-app on ubuntu-latest. The build-openbios job checks out the repository, cancels previous runs, updates packages, installs dependencies, builds OpenBIOS, and uploads the results as artifacts. The macos-build-and-test job checks out the repository, restores and updates Homebrew, installs dependencies, fetches submodules, builds PCSX-Redux, downloads OpenBIOS and test artifacts, bundles and packages the application, signs it, creates a DMG file, and uploads it as an artifact. The publish-app job checks out the repository, installs Node.js and appcenter-cli, downloads the DMG artifact, and distributes it to AppCenter.
